chunks.title: Accession and Character of Jotham
chunks.reason: Introduces the king's age, reign, mother, and general spiritual standing compared to his father.

chunks.title: Building Projects and Military Victory
chunks.reason: Details Jotham's architectural works in Jerusalem and Judah, followed by his victory over Ammon.

chunks.title: Conclusion of Reign and Death
chunks.reason: Summarizes the reason for his success, references external records, and notes his death and succession.
